THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GORDON, WILLIAM C. SR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORDON, WILLIAM C. JR. $200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, WILLIAM C. JR.
